special_mechanics.name: Whip Weapon
special_mechanics.description: Primary melee weapon with extended range, comparable to Castlevania series mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Ragdoll Movement
special_mechanics.description: Character composed of multiple sprites to create fluid ragdoll-like movement animation

special_mechanics.name: Secondary Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Three additional weapons: exploding rocks, morning star, and hammer-like weapon, used in specific areas only

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. Wikipedia source provides only gameplay overview and narrative details. No technical physics parameters documented. Game described as 2D side-scrolling platform with whip-based combat. Character movement animation uses multiple sprites for ragdoll effect, but exact physics values not specified in available sources.
